heroHeadline: Russian Drone Strike Kills 5 Civilians at Market as Easter Escalation Continues
heroSubtitle: Russia launches drone strike on a civilian market on Day 1,500 of the full-scale invasion, killing five civilians; Sky News reports Ukrainian officials confirmed the attack; earlier combined missile and drone strikes killed at least 14 civilians — Zelensky condemns the 'Easter escalation'; cumulative Russian personnel losses exceed 1,301,260 as Zelensky visits Turkey for diplomatic talks
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
